name: 3lallah Repo
subtitle: Curated IPA source by 3lallah
description: 3lallah Repo is a self-hosted IPA source compatible with AltStore, Feather, SideStore, and other AltStore-style sideloaders.

apps.name: Mawared
apps.subtitle: Saudi MOH human resources app
apps.localizedDescription: Mawared is the Saudi Ministry of Health's human-resources application, providing employees access to HR services, leave requests, payroll information, and internal MOH workflows.
